description: Sample live market data for testing market cache and scanners

markets.title: Will Trump run for President in 2028?
markets.description: Resolves YES if Trump officially files to run for President in 2028.

markets.title: Will S&P 500 close above 5500 by end of March 2026?
markets.description: Resolves YES if the S&P 500 index closes at or above 5500 on any trading day in March 2026.

markets.title: Will Bitcoin reach $150k in 2026?
markets.description: Resolves YES if Bitcoin trades at or above $150,000 USD on any major exchange in 2026.

markets.title: Boston Celtics to win 2026 NBA Finals
markets.description: Market for Boston Celtics winning the 2025-26 NBA Championship.

markets.title: Will there be a US recession in 2026?
markets.description: Resolves YES if the NBER declares a recession occurring in 2026.

markets.title: Will OpenAI release GPT-5 in 2026?
markets.description: Resolves YES if OpenAI publicly releases or announces GPT-5 in 2026.

markets.title: Real Madrid to win Champions League 2025-26
markets.description: Market for Real Madrid winning the 2025-26 UEFA Champions League.

markets.title: Will the Fed cut rates at March 2026 FOMC?
markets.description: Resolves YES if the Fed announces a rate cut at the March 2026 FOMC meeting.

markets.title: Will Ethereum reach $10,000 in 2026?
markets.description: Resolves YES if Ethereum trades at or above $10,000 USD on any major exchange in 2026.

markets.title: Will March 2026 unemployment be under 4.5%?
markets.description: Resolves YES if the BLS reports March 2026 unemployment rate below 4.5%.
